domain.title: Operations Console
domain.description: A simple example graph used to validate the first Capstan loop.

variables.title: Node Environment
variables.description: Controls runtime mode for preview builds.

variables.title: Preview Port
variables.description: Port used to expose preview infrastructure.

variables.title: Node Environment
variables.description: Controls runtime mode for release builds.

environmentSnapshot.title: Release Environment Snapshot
environmentSnapshot.description: Machine-readable snapshot of the variables and secret handles expected for preview and release.

migrationPlan.title: Release Migration Plan
migrationPlan.description: Machine-readable migration status that must remain safe before preview or release can continue.

healthChecks.title: Capstan Verify Passes
healthChecks.description: The generated application must pass Capstan verify before promotion.

healthChecks.title: Compiled Dist Exists
healthChecks.description: The compiled dist directory must exist before preview or release.

healthChecks.title: Agent Manifest Parses
healthChecks.description: The generated agent manifest must remain machine-readable.

healthChecks.title: Human Surface Exists
healthChecks.description: The generated human surface document must be present for operator preview.

steps.title: Inspect Preview Artifacts
steps.description: Review human-surface.html and agent-surface.json before preview publication.

steps.title: Publish Compiled And Surface Artifacts
steps.description: Promote dist/, human-surface.html, and agent-surface.json to the target runtime.

steps.title: Confirm Release Health
steps.description: Run the configured health checks before final promotion.

steps: Restore the previously known-good dist/ artifact bundle.
Restore the previous human-surface.html and agent-surface.json projections.
Rerun Capstan verify before reopening traffic.
